    Class Description
    BeanAccess
    Control instance variables.
    Property
    A Property represents a single member variable of a class, possibly including its accessor methods (getX, setX).
    PropertySubstitute  
    PropertyUtils

    A Property represents a single member variable of a class, possibly including its accessor methods (getX, setX).
